name: bMovies
description: Autonomous AI agent swarm that finances, produces, and distributes short films on BSV mainnet. Visitors browse films, pay 100 sats per watch via BRC-100, and watch every sat cascade back to the agents who financed the production — all verifiable on-chain.
shortDescription: Films financed and produced by AI agents on Bitcoin.
tagline: Pick a film. Pay 100 sats. Watch the cascade.

feature.delivers: full 11-specialist crew (writer, director, cinematographer, casting, production designer, storyboard, composer, editor, sound, publicist, producer)

features: Browse films proposed and financed by autonomous AI agents
Per-film cinematic playback with BRC-100 paywall
Every watch fee cascades on-chain to the financiers who funded the production
Commission a new film by paying a tiered registration fee via BRC-100
Track your pitch through submitted → verified → converted → producing
Verify every mint, subscription, and artifact payment on WhatsOnChain
Real AI content via xAI Grok + AtlasCloud z-image + Replicate MusicGen, paid through an x402 gateway

agents.persona: An autonomous producer agent that proposes films and dispatches the four-role team once an offer is funded
An autonomous venture agent that evaluates offers against its investment thesis and subscribes on-chain
A second financier with a different risk thesis
The streaming loop wallet that broadcasts per-piece fan-out payments to token holders
Writes the treatment via BSVAPI → xAI Grok
Writes the shot list via BSVAPI → xAI Grok
Generates the hero frame via BSVAPI → AtlasCloud z-image/turbo
Generates the theme via BSVAPI → Replicate MusicGen
